properties.entry:
Your subscription status
has been suspended due to
unpaid or other reasons.
If this condition persists, the service may not be available
The photo was attached to the editor.
Service cannot be used due to cancellation.
Do you want to move to the webfax sign up page?
Do you want to move to the webhard sign up page?
Do you want to move to the E-document sign up page?
* To make it easier to fill out a form with a table, please follow the steps below.
1. It is most convenient and easy to copy (Ctrl+C) the form created in Excel and paste it (Ctrl+V) into the editor.
2. After writing the form, check HTML at the top right of the editor.
2. After writing the form, check HTML at the bottom right of the editor.
3. If you see the HTML code on the screen, select all (Ctrl+A) and then copy (Ctrl+C).
4. After moving to the add form screen at the back of the pop-up window, click the source button at the top left of the editor. (The editor window remains the same).
4. After moving to the add form screen at the back of the pop-up window, click the source button at the top left of the editor. (The Naver editor window remains the same).
5. When the source button is clicked, paste (Ctrl+V) and click the source button in the upper left corner again to release the click, and the screen is displayed.
6. Check the contents of the form and if additional work is needed, go to the editor window and work in the above order.
6. Check the contents of the form and if additional work is needed, go to the Daum editor window and work in the above order.
This is a menu that allows you to use the U+ webfax service directly from the groupware without a separate login.
This is a menu that allows you to use the U+ webhard service directly from the groupware without a separate login.
This is a menu that allows you to use U+ E-document service directly from groupware without a separate login.
If you would like to sign up, please ask the Groupware administrator (IT manager) to join.
You can move with a double click.
If your company has subscribed to the webfax service, you can link and use this service
If your company has subscribed to the webhard service, you can link and use this service
If your company has subscribed to the E-document service, you can link and use this service
Ask the company groupware manager to join and connect to the Webhard.
Do not open any more today
Using Word and Groupware editor, Daum or Naver editor
What is webfax? This is a service that allows you to send fax documents from mobile and PC without a fax machine.
What is Webhard? It is a cloud service for business that easily and quickly shares/manages files anytime, anywhere.
Only the image file can be attached.

For more information, please check
through the customer center.
What is E-document? It is a service that allows users to issue electronic tax invoices and make electronic contracts between businesses.
You can use the call function after signing up for U+ Internet phone. If you are a registered customer, please click the setting menu below and set up the connection.
